resources.string: Enables the screen locking capability on a double tap event instantly, using the Android system GLOBAL_ACTION_LOCK_SCREEN API. Safe and low-power consumption.
Double Tap Screen Off Fallback Admin
Allows the application to immediately lock the screen via DevicePolicyManager when accessibility service is not currently active.
Enables double tap detection anywhere on your Home Screen background to instantly lock the screen with low battery consumption.
Please enable Accessibility Service for Double Tap Screen Off
Please enable Device Administrator for Fallback Screen Locking
